title: MR Adnexal Mass
description: This MRI pelvis structured report can be utilized for the characterization of an adnexal mass. In addition to a structured report, this can be used a checklist for the most important imaging features that can help narrow the preoperative differential diagnosis.
author: rsna_00772247
